scores.notes: Text accuracy suffers from misspellings (e.g., 'Descriptionf', 'Serrtoel', 'Relerenze') and wrong characters (e.g., '38:36' instead of '38.36'). Table structure is mostly preserved but has alignment issues. Numeric precision is inconsistent with incorrect decimal points and formats (e.g., '118:68', '6661-90-90'). Layout preservation is decent, but some reading order issues exist. Completeness is good, with no major missing sections.
